_comment: Strings the Flutter app needs that have NO counterpart in the Kotlin
This file exists because the generated ARBs say 'do not hand-edit' and a
regeneration DOES destroy anything added by hand — which is exactly what
happened to `linkCouldNotOpen` (it had been hand-added and translated into
all five locales, and a regen silently wiped every one of them).
Put Flutter-only strings HERE instead, and xml_to_arb.dart will merge them
into every locale on each run. `en` is required; a locale you omit falls
back to the `en` value, exactly like a missing Kotlin translation does.

linkCouldNotOpen.en: The link could not be opened.
linkCouldNotOpen.de: Der Link konnte nicht geöffnet werden.
linkCouldNotOpen.es: No se pudo abrir el enlace.
